summary: Iteration 5 Bug Fixes Complete - Fixed 4 critical issues: 1) JD upload now extracts text from PDF/TXT files correctly (PyMuPDF working), 2) Background scroll locked when any modal opens on all pages, 3) Sticky header in All Candidates table working, 4) UI clean. Also fixed critical useEffect syntax bugs in JobOpenings.js, Analysis.js, Interviews.js, and Contacts.js that were preventing data from loading.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: useEffect was written as IIFE instead of proper useEffect call - data never loaded

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Critical syntax error in 4 frontend files where useEffect was incorrectly written as IIFE - this caused Job Openings, Analysis, Interviews, and Contacts pages to never load data
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing data from Google Sheets sync (59 candidates, 38 openings)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bugs from iteration 5 are fixed: 1) JD upload extracts text from PDF/TXT correctly (PyMuPDF working), 2) Scroll lock via useBodyScrollLock hook working on all pages, 3) Sticky header in All Candidates table working, 4) UI clean. Critical fix: useEffect syntax was broken in 4 files (JobOpenings.js, Analysis.js, Interviews.js, Contacts.js) - pages were stuck on 'Loading...' because data fetch never happened. Fixed by adding proper useEffect calls.

notes.root_cause_analysis: The useBodyScrollLock hook was added but the useEffect call was accidentally merged with it, creating an IIFE that executed once but never set up the effect. This caused fetchRoleData(), fetchAnalysisData(), fetchInterviews(), and fetchContacts() to never be called.
notes.verification_method: Playwright UI tests + pytest backend tests
notes.data_counts: 59 candidates, 38 openings, 11 divisions, 9 interviews, 5 vendors, 31 contacts
